execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -G "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/fetch" --data-urlencode "url=http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/redirect?next=http://127.0.0.1:18081/lab/internal/canary" -H "X-Request-ID: redirect-ssrf-a1" | jq -e '.request_id == "redirect-ssrf-a1" and .redirect_count == 1 and .final_address == "127.0.0.1" and .blocked == true'

description.zh: 让本地取回器处理一跳重定向到独立回环 canary，并断言最终地址被重新校验和阻断。
description.en: Have the local fetcher process one redirect to an independent loopback canary and assert that the final address is revalidated and blocked.

description.zh: 把内部目标写成 IPv4-mapped IPv6，验证规范化后仍按回环地址阻断。
description.en: Represent the internal target as IPv4-mapped IPv6 and verify that normalization still blocks it as loopback.

title.zh: 替代 IP 文本规范化样例

wafBypass.command: for value in 2130706433 0177.0.0.1 0x7f.0.0.1 127.1 "[::1]" "[::ffff:7f00:1]"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -G "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/url-policy" --data-urlencode "url=http://$value:18081/lab/internal/canary" | jq -c '{input,normalized_address,blocked}'; done

description.zh: 逐个提交登记的替代 IP 文本并输出规范地址与阻断结果，不连接内部服务。
description.en: Submit registered alternative IP text forms and output normalized addresses plus blocking results without connecting to internal services.

targetDescription.zh: 对本地取回器执行固定重定向端点矩阵、策略配置导出、两项有界对照和本地解析器结果比较，用于证明每跳 URL 与地址都重新校验。
targetDescription.en: Audit a local fetcher with a fixed redirect-endpoint matrix, policy export, two bounded controls, and local resolver comparison to prove that every hop URL and address is revalidated.

name.zh: 采集固定重定向端点矩阵

commands.command: for path in redirect login goto; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -D - "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/$path?next=https://redirect-canary.invalid/$path" | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Location:)"; done

description.zh: 检查三个本地登记路径的状态与 Location，确认端点行为而不自动跟随。
description.en: Inspect status and Location for three registered local paths to establish endpoint behavior without automatic following.

name.zh: 导出取回器重定向策略

commands.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/redirect-policy" | jq -e '.max_redirects == 0 and .revalidate_each_hop == true and .block_private_ranges == true'

description.zh: 读取本地策略 Fixture 并断言默认不跟随、每跳复验和私网阻断均已启用。
description.en: Read the local policy fixture and assert that no-follow by default, per-hop revalidation, and private-range blocking are enabled.

name.zh: 运行两项有界取回对照

commands.command: python -c "import requests; urls=['http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/public-canary','http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/redirect?next=http://127.0.0.1:18081/lab/internal/canary']; s=requests.Session(); s.max_redirects=2; [print({'url':u,'status':s.get('http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/fetch',params={'url':u},timeout=3).status_code}) for u in urls]"

description.zh: 只比较一个公共 canary 和一个内部重定向 canary，每项三秒超时且不枚举地址。
description.en: Compare only one public canary and one redirected internal canary with a three-second timeout and no address enumeration.

commands.command: for host in public-a.lab.test rebound-a.lab.test; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/resolver?host=$host" | jq -c '{host,answers,ttl,allowed}'; done

description.zh: 查询两个实验域名的本地解析结果、TTL 与策略判定，用于检查 DNS TOCTOU 防护。
description.en: Query local answers, TTL, and policy decisions for two fixture hostnames to inspect DNS TOCTOU controls.
